critical_issues.issue: Excessive contradiction rates across all insights
critical_issues.description: Average 4.4 contradictions per insight suggests systematic issues with claim precision or evidence interpretation
critical_issues.remediation: Re-examine evidence coding for each high-contradiction insight; consider narrowing claims or adding qualifying conditions

critical_issues.issue: Graduate sample size insufficient for confident segmentation
critical_issues.description: INS_005 based on only 8 participants - insufficient for confident graduate-specific claims
critical_issues.remediation: Either combine with undergraduate comparison data or flag as tentative finding requiring validation

moderate_issues.description: Wide range in coded segments (15-106) suggests some participants may be over-represented in findings
moderate_issues.remediation: Weight analysis by participant contribution or verify findings hold across low and high contributors

moderate_issues.description: Persona participant counts don't sum to 35 total participants - unclear if overlapping or exclusive categories
moderate_issues.remediation: Clarify persona methodology and provide evidence distribution matrix

moderate_issues.description: Only 4 triangulation comparisons mentioned without specifics on what was compared or results
moderate_issues.remediation: Provide detailed triangulation results showing diary vs interview consistency

recommended_deep_dives.description: Systematically analyze the 35 contradictions to identify if they represent genuine complexity, coding errors, or overgeneralized claims
recommended_deep_dives.expected_outcome: Refined insights with appropriate qualifying conditions

recommended_deep_dives.description: Re-examine graduate sample (n=8) findings for statistical significance and practical meaningfulness
recommended_deep_dives.expected_outcome: Either strengthened graduate insights or flagged tentative findings

recommended_deep_dives.description: Detailed comparison of behavioral claims from interviews vs actual diary patterns
recommended_deep_dives.expected_outcome: Validated behavioral insights with clear methodology notes

recommended_deep_dives.description: Verify persona categories are mutually exclusive and exhaustive, with clear evidence distribution
recommended_deep_dives.expected_outcome: Robust persona framework with clear boundaries and evidence base

evidence_strength_summary.overall_data_richness: HIGH - 1851 coded segments across 35 participants provides substantial evidence base
